_comment: Known-failures manifest for the Plato conformance suite (docs/plato-roadmap.md Phase 1.5).
Each entry quarantines one (law-or-witness, type) pair that fails against the library.
References point into docs/plato-library-review.md. This file is the work queue for the
content-leads bug burn-down: when a fix lands, REMOVE its entry in the same change, else the
runner fails the still-listed entry with 'remove from manifest'.
Schema: test = Law_*/Witness_* member name; type = generated type carrying the law (omit for witnesses).
Remaining: the 5 Time laws (unfulfilled IMeasure obligations) pending the Time arithmetic fix.

knownFailures.reason: Generated Time.LessThanOrEquals is a throwing stub: IMeasure requires IOrderable but no implementation exists for Time (unfulfilled interface obligation, silently accepted).
knownFailures.reference: plato-library-review.md §2.1 check 1 (cf. §1.8); discovered by Phase 1 harness

knownFailures.reason: Generated Time.LessThanOrEquals is a throwing stub (unfulfilled IOrderable obligation).
knownFailures.reference: plato-library-review.md §2.1 check 1 (cf. §1.8); discovered by Phase 1 harness

knownFailures.reason: Generated Time.Multiply(Number) is a throwing stub: IMeasure requires IScalarArithmetic but Multiply/Divide/Modulo are unimplemented for Time.
knownFailures.reference: plato-library-review.md §2.1 check 1 (cf. §1.8); discovered by Phase 1 harness

knownFailures.reason: Generated Time.Multiply(Number)/Divide(Number) are throwing stubs (unfulfilled IScalarArithmetic obligation).
knownFailures.reference: plato-library-review.md §2.1 check 1 (cf. §1.8); discovered by Phase 1 harness

knownFailures.reason: Law body multiplies by a scalar; generated Time.Multiply(Number) is a throwing stub (unfulfilled IScalarArithmetic obligation).
knownFailures.reference: plato-library-review.md §2.1 check 1 (cf. §1.8); discovered by Phase 1 harness
